title: waleedmandour/CorpusMind
summary: Local-first, AI-native research environment for corpus linguistics and multimodal discourse analysis. Phase 0: foundations shipped — engine (FastAPI), web (PWA), desktop (Tauri 2), full §12 statistics with tests, AGPL-3.0.

title: bug-ops/zeph

title: 91zgaoge/StoryForge
